message:
test(fabric): add mirror-source-drain and control-plane advisory E2E scenarios

Exercises the federation replication lifecycle end-to-end:
- MirrorSourceDrainOutcome and ControlPlaneAdvisoryOutcome structs
  capture the multi-step scenario results
- run_mirror_source_drain: tests federation bridge export/apply,
  replication catch-up planning, mirror-to-source transfer,
  close-before-drain blocking semantics, and region drain lifecycle
  with cooperative yield-based stepping
- Imports RegionBridge, FederationBridge, FederationRole,
  ReplicationConfig, GatewayConfig, Stream/StreamConfig,
  InMemoryStorageBackend, ControlBudget, SystemSubjectFamily,
  Morphism, ShardedSublist, and Subject to wire the scenario

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
